title: Intimacy
tmdbOverview: Failed musician Jay abandoned his family and now earns a living as head bartender in a trendy London pub. Every Wednesday afternoon, a woman comes to his house for graphic, almost wordless, sex. One day, Jay follows her and learns about her. This eventually disrupts their relationship.
synopsis: Released in 2001, Intimacy is a romance, drama and fantasy film from France. It carries a 6.0 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 16 certification (CH rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
